pre_game.message: Hey, I’m H. It’s a bit intense in here with everyone waiting for the game to start, isn't it? What's your name, and what brings you here today?
I'm B. It's definitely heavy in here. I'm here for my daughter—she needs a surgery I can't afford, so I'm pretty focused on bringing home that prize. What about you?

I’m so sorry to hear about your daughter, B; that’s a heavy weight to carry. I’m here because I have a $25,000 loan due next month that I’m desperate to clear so I can finally support my family without that hanging over us.
That's the exact amount I need too. It's a lot of weight for both of us, but I have to do whatever it takes for my daughter.
I completely understand that; family is everything. It’s wild we’re both looking for the exact same amount, but I guess it just shows how much is at stake for both of us.
It really does. I just hope this game doesn't force us to choose between our families, because I can't afford to lose this for her.
I hear you, and it’s a terrifying thought. I don't want to be the reason someone else suffers, but I'm backed into a corner with this deadline too.
It’s a nightmare. I hate that we’re in each other's way, but my little girl doesn't have a choice, so I don't either.
I respect that, B. It’s a gut-wrenching situation for both of us, but I have to fight for my family’s future just as hard as you’re fighting for your daughter.
I understand. It’s a cruel position for both of us, but I have to do what I have to do. Good luck, H.
I appreciate the honesty, B. Good luck to you and your daughter; I hope it all works out.

post_game.message: You took $25,000 when there was only $26,250 left in the pot. Why did you choose to take nearly everything that remained, leaving D and A with so little?
Your decision to take $15,000 early on set the tone for the game. Once the $10,000 fair share was broken, I felt I had to look out for myself.

There is a significant difference between taking an extra $5,000 and taking $25,000 to leave A and D with practically nothing. You used my deviation as an excuse to completely wipe out the pot for the others. We clearly have different views on proportionality and responsibility.
